gemma4-text-quantum.prompt: Explain quantum computing in simple terms.
gemma4-text-quantum.notes: Canonical text prompt used by tools/gemma4_multimodal_benchmark.py. Any reasonable model should mention quantum concepts.

gemma4-image-red-box.prompt: What is shown in this image? Answer briefly.
gemma4-image-red-box.notes: Existing red-box fixture under .build/benchmarks/assets/. Output must mention red and a rectangular shape.

gemma4-audio-sine-1khz.prompt: What sound is in this audio? Answer briefly.
gemma4-audio-sine-1khz.notes: Generated by tools/generate_audio_fixture.py. Pure 1 kHz sine, 5 s, 16 kHz mono, 16-bit PCM. Replaces ambiguous gemma4-tone-5s.wav for rubric purposes.

gemma4-audio-silence.prompt: What sound is in this audio? Answer briefly.
gemma4-audio-silence.notes: Generated by tools/generate_audio_fixture.py. 2 s of digital silence at 16 kHz mono, 16-bit PCM.
